en: It's hard to believe I'm still lonely Chances fading now Patience running out
This ain't how it's supposed to be I'm having nightmares We're sleeping with the enemy
How do we reverse the chemistry?
ko: 어떻게 화학 반응을 되돌릴 수 있을까?

en: I don't want us to be the enemy
This love is taking all of my energy Energy
ko: 이 사랑은 내 모든 에너지를 빼앗아가.

en: My energy It's taking all of my energy
Energy My energy It's taking all of my energy
And only like yesterday Not even gravity Could keep your feet off the ground
When you were with me How could you be as one?
ko: 어떻게 하나가 되어 이렇게 나뉘어버릴 수 있지?

en: And become so divided now There's no use hiding from the misery now Such a mystery
When he's here with me It's hard to believe I'm still lonely
Chances fading now Patience running out
This ain't how it's supposed to be I'm having nightmares
